headline: Idexx (IDXX) Q1 2026 Earnings Call Transcript
summary: During the first quarter, IDEXX delivered exceptional financial results through continued execution in our companion animal business with benefits from IDEXX innovations.  Revenue increased 14% as reported and 11% organically supported by over 11% organic growth in CAG Diagnostics recurring revenues, reflecting nearly 11% gains in the U.S. and approximately 12% growth in international regions.  CAG Diagnostic recurring revenue growth in Q1 was negatively impacted by declines in U.S. same-store clinical visits of approximately 1%, with slightly positive growth in non-well visits more than offset by pressure on wellness visits.

headline: Is It Too Late To Consider IDEXX Laboratories (IDXX) After Its 18.5% One-Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether IDEXX Laboratories at around US$563 per share looks expensive, cheap or somewhere in between, this article walks through key valuation checks to help you frame that question for yourself. The stock is up 18.5% over the past year. However, the year to date return of 16.0% and recent 7 day and 30 day returns of 2.1% and 1.1% show that the ride has not been in a straight line.
